benchmarks.name: TPC-H
benchmarks.dataset_notes: Public benchmark specification from TPC. Data generation follows dbgen/qgen tooling from the benchmark kit.

logicdb_assets.provenance_notes: Aligned to the paper's TPC-H mainline decision: the good17 phased workload excludes T10 from the primary positive path and keeps the supported templates [1,2,4,5,6,7,8,9,11,12,13,14,15,17,19,20,22].

benchmarks.name: TPC-DS
benchmarks.category: Decision support benchmark with complex retail schema
benchmarks.dataset_notes: Public benchmark specification from TPC. Query streams are derived from benchmark SQL templates and adapted into JSONL workloads.

logicdb_assets.provenance_notes: Aligned to the paper's paired TPC-DS run manifest and DuckDB baseline/LogicDB comparison for the repeat2 phase-drift workload.

benchmarks.name: JOB
benchmarks.category: Join Order Benchmark over IMDB-style schema
benchmarks.dataset_notes: Based on the Join Order Benchmark query set. A convenient containerized preparation path is also documented in jo-bench.

logicdb_assets.provenance_notes: Aligned to the paper's paired JOB phased-valid run manifest and reference baseline for the 1130-query workload.
